name: coding_agent
purpose: Map common agent-skill workflows into KDNA cognition domains for coding agents.

use_when: agent is about to implement without enough context
user provides a wish without scope or criteria
agent is about to write implementation without a failing test

composition_rules: requirement_alignment leads — all other domains interpret tasks relative to aligned requirements
shared_language constrains terminology across all domains
bug_diagnosis and test_driven_development complement but do not override each other
handoff_context activates only when session continuity is at risk
routing_questions: Is the user request clear or vague?
Is there a bug, test failure, or performance issue?
Is the agent about to write code without a test?
Does the change affect architecture or module boundaries?
Does the session need to be compacted or handed off?
